description: Desktop infrastructure for AI agents. Create workspaces, provision virtual computers, and control them programmatically.

tools.name: computers_create
tools.description: Creates a new virtual computer in a workspace. The computer starts automatically after creation. Required: name, workspace_id. Optional: auto_stop_minutes, cpu (default: 1), disk_size_gb (default: 8) (plus 4 more). Returns the new Computer.

params.name: auto_stop_minutes
params.description: Auto-stop after this many minutes of inactivity. Set to 0 to disable. Free tier locked to 15 minutes.

params.name: disk_size_gb
params.description: Disk size in GB. Capped by plan.

params.name: image
params.description: Custom Docker image reference. Use with templates built via the SDK.

params.name: ram
params.description: RAM in GB. Capped by plan.

params.name: workspace_id
params.description: ID of the workspace to create the computer in

tools.name: computers_delete
tools.description: Permanently deletes a computer and all its data. Required: id. Returns the ComputersDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: computers_get
tools.description: Returns computer details including current status. Required: id.

tools.name: computers_auto-stop_get
tools.description: Returns the current auto-stop configuration for a computer. Required: id.

tools.name: computers_auto-stop_update
tools.description: Updates the auto-stop setting for a computer. Paid plans only — free tier is fixed at 15 minutes. Required: id, auto_stop_minutes. Returns the updated AutoStopUpdateResponse.

params.name: auto_stop_minutes
params.description: Minutes of inactivity before auto-stop. Set to 0 to disable.

tools.name: computers_bash_execute
tools.description: Executes a bash command on the computer. Required: id, command. Returns the new BashResponse.

tools.name: computers_click_mouse
tools.description: Performs a mouse click at the specified coordinates. Required: id, x, y. Optional: button (default: left), double (default: false). Returns the new ActionResponse.

tools.name: computers_clone_computer
tools.description: Creates a copy of a computer with the same disk state. Counts toward your plan's computer limit. Required: id. Returns the new CloneComputerResponse.

tools.name: computers_drag_mouse
tools.description: Performs a mouse drag from start to end coordinates. Required: id, end_x, end_y, start_x, start_y. Optional: button (default: left), duration (default: 0.5). Returns the new ActionResponse.

tools.name: computers_exec_execute-python
tools.description: Executes Python code on the computer. Required: id, code. Optional: timeout (default: 10). Returns the new ExecResponse.

tools.name: computers_key_press
tools.description: Presses a key or key combination (e.g., Enter, Tab, ctrl+c). Required: id, key. Returns the new ActionResponse.

params.name: key
params.description: Key or key combination (e.g., Enter, Tab, ctrl+c, alt+F4)

tools.name: computers_move_computer
tools.description: Moves a computer to a different workspace. Both source and destination must be owned by you. Required: id, project_id. Returns the updated MoveComputerResponse.

tools.name: computers_resize_computer
tools.description: Live-resizes a running computer's CPU, RAM, disk, or bandwidth. All fields optional — only include what you want to change. Required: id. Optional: bandwidth_limit_mbps, disk_size_gb, mem_gb (plus 1 more). Returns the updated ResizeComputerResponse.

params.name: bandwidth_limit_mbps
params.description: New bandwidth cap in Mbps. Capped by plan.

params.name: disk_size_gb
params.description: New disk size in GB. Grow only — shrinking not supported.

params.name: mem_gb
params.description: New RAM in GB. Capped by plan.

params.name: vcpus
params.description: New CPU count. Capped by plan.

tools.name: computers_restart_computer
tools.description: Restarts a computer. Equivalent to stop + start. Required: id. Returns the new RestartComputerResponse.

tools.name: computers_screenshot_get
tools.description: Captures a screenshot of the computer display. Returns base64-encoded PNG or a URL. Required: id.

tools.name: computers_scroll_scroll
tools.description: Scrolls the mouse wheel up or down. Required: id, direction. Optional: amount (default: 3). Returns the new ActionResponse.

tools.name: computers_start_computer
tools.description: Starts a stopped computer. Computers auto-stop after inactivity. Required: id. Returns the new StartComputerResponse.

tools.name: computers_stop_computer
tools.description: Stops a running computer. State is preserved. Required: id. Returns the new StopComputerResponse.

tools.name: computers_stream_get-status
tools.description: Returns the current streaming status. Required: id.

tools.name: computers_stream_start
tools.description: Starts streaming the computer display via RTMP to a configured connection. Required: id, connection_name. Returns the new StreamStartResponse.

params.name: connection_name
params.description: Name of the configured RTMP connection

tools.name: computers_stream_stop
tools.description: Stops the active RTMP stream. Required: id. Returns the new StreamStopResponse.

tools.name: computers_type_text
tools.description: Types text on the computer keyboard. Required: id, text. Returns the new ActionResponse.

tools.name: computers_vnc-password_get
tools.description: Returns the VNC password for direct VNC connection to the computer. Only accessible by workspace owners and members. Required: id.

tools.name: computers_wait_wait
tools.description: Pauses execution for the specified duration. Required: id, duration. Returns the new ActionResponse.

tools.name: files_delete
tools.description: Permanently deletes a file from storage. Required: id. Returns the FilesDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: files_download
tools.description: Returns a signed download URL for a file. URLs expire in 1 hour. Required: id.

tools.name: files_export
tools.description: Exports a file from the computer's filesystem and returns a download URL. Required: desktopId, path.

params.name: path
params.description: Path to file on computer (e.g., Desktop/results.txt)

tools.name: files_list
tools.description: Lists all files in a workspace, optionally filtered by computer. Required: projectId. Optional: desktopId. Returns the FileListResponse.

params.name: desktopId
params.description: Optional computer ID to filter by

tools.name: files_upload
tools.description: Uploads a file to a workspace. Maximum file size is 10MB. Required: file, projectId. Optional: desktopId. Returns the new FileUploadResponse.

params.name: desktopId
params.description: Optional computer ID to associate the file with

tools.name: workspaces_create
tools.description: Creates a new workspace. Workspace names must be unique per user. Required: name. Optional: icon_url, status (default: active). Returns the new Workspace.

params.name: name
params.description: Workspace name. Must be unique within your account.

tools.name: workspaces_delete
tools.description: Deletes a workspace and all its computers. This action cannot be undone. Required: id. Returns the WorkspacesDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: workspaces_get
tools.description: Returns a workspace by ID, including its computers. Required: id.

tools.name: workspaces_list
tools.description: Returns all workspaces for the authenticated user.
